what_it_does: This file is a YAML-frontmatter metadata record for a channel attachment of type board_items, linking a dragnet-development channel artifact to a board item URI.
observations: No body content or symbols are present
standouts: The attachment target uses a board:// URI scheme pointing to item-18ba02cc
It is scoped to the dragnet-development channel
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with key-value metadata
id follows an att- prefix pattern
Timestamp is ISO 8601 with explicit timezone offset
Target uses a URI-style board:// identifier
concerns: The file contains only metadata and no payload or context about what is being attached
No author or provenance field is recorded
The meaning and lifecycle of the board:// target are not explained here
notes: A minimal channel-memory attachment record that ties a dragnet-development artifact to a specific board item by URI.
questions: What content or message does this attachment represent?
Who added this attachment and why?
Is board_items a one-to-one or one-to-many relationship?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears to be a metadata record for a board_items attachment, and its content matches that purpose with no obvious mismatch.
apparent_themes: Cross-surface linking between chat and board items
intention_signals: It seems to be trying to persist a typed, timestamped association between a channel artifact and a board item so the relationship can be queried later.
novelty: The use of a board:// URI as the target of a channel attachment is a distinct linking convention.
contribution: Provides a small, timestamped, typed link between a channel artifact and a board item, which a fused system could keep as a cross-reference record.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML metadata attachment record in the dragnet-development channel that links an artifact to board item item-18ba02cc via a board:// URI.
intention_for_embedding: To record that a channel artifact is associated with board item item-18ba02cc as a board_items attachment.
